name: Payday Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cake mix, 1/3 cup margarine, and egg in a bowl.
2. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9 x 13 pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 12 to 18 minutes.
4. Remove from the oven.
5. Sprinkle with marshmallows.
6. Return to the oven for 1 to 2 minutes, until the marshmallows begin to puff.
7. In a saucepan, heat the corn syrup, 1/4 cup margarine, vanilla, and peanut butter chips until melted.
8. Remove from heat and stir in the peanuts.
9. Spoon over the marshmallows and spread to cover.
10. Chill and cut into bars. (I did not chill)
